steps.title: Find the boundary line equation
steps.content: Reading the graph, the boundary passes through $(0,-1)$ and $(1,-4)$. The slope is $\frac{-4-(-1)}{1-0}=-3$, giving $y=-1-3x$.

steps.title: Pick the inequality direction from the shading
steps.content: Test the shaded point $(0,0)$ in $y\gt-1-3x$: $0\gt-1$ ✓, and the dashed boundary confirms a strict inequality. So $$y\gt-1-3x.$$ That is the correct answer.
